commands.review_summary:
The PR routes `/btw` fallback streams through `resolveEmbeddedAgentStreamFn` and adds focused MiniMax Anthropic token-cap regression tests.

PR surface: Source +10, Tests +77. Total +87 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was run in this review. The linked issue has concrete user-visible error text, and current main/source shows `/btw` can fall back to `streamSimple` while the normal embedded resolver uses the capped Anthropic transport, so it is source-reproducible with medium confidence.
